hero.title: Your personal context,
hero.description: Nomi is the AI-powered way to create and maintain your digital identity. Export it as a portable .md file that works with any AI product.

preview.title: Your story, structured
preview.description: Nomi creates a comprehensive personal context through natural conversation. Export it anytime as a clean .md file.

chat.title: Natural conversation
chat.description: No forms to fill. Just chat with Nomi and your profile builds itself.

export.title: Portable .md export
export.description: Download your profile as a Markdown file. Use it with ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI.

match.title: Smart matching
match.description: Optionally connect with people who share your goals and values.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.description: Your data stays yours. Export, delete, or modify anytime.

ai.title: AI-powered insights
ai.description: Nomi helps you articulate what makes you unique.

update.title: Always current
update.description: Update your profile through conversation as you grow and change.

finalCta.title: Ready to create your digital identity?
finalCta.description: Join thousands of people who use Nomi to maintain their personal context.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to your profile

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start building your digital identity
signup.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.description: Chat with Nomi to create your personal context. It only takes a few minutes.

generating.title: Generating your AI agent...
generating.description: We're creating your personalized agent profiles. This usually takes about 30 seconds.

matchingOff.title: Matching is off
matchingOff.description: Turn on matching in your profile to start connecting with others.

matchingOn.title: Your AI agents are working
matchingOn.description: They're finding meaningful connections based on your profile.

recentMatches.title: Recent Matches
recentMatches.empty: No matches yet. Your AI agents are searching!

profile.title: Profile
profile.noProfileDescription: Create your profile to get started
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, all your data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: To confirm, please type DELETE below:
profile.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

matches.title: Your Matches
matches.emptyDescription: We're working on finding your perfect matches. Check back soon!

detail.title: Match Details
detail.waitingDescription: You've approved this match. Waiting for {name} to respond.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.subtitle: Your scheduled and past meetings
meetings.emptyDescription: When you confirm a match, a meeting will be automatically scheduled.

feedback.title: Meeting Feedback
feedback.notesPlaceholderNoShow: Tell us why you didn't meet...
feedback.selectDidMeet: Please select whether the meeting happened

onboarding.greeting: Hey {name}! I'm Nomi, your AI assistant 👋
onboarding.greetingNoName: Hey there! I'm Nomi, your AI assistant 👋
onboarding.introWithName:
I see you've signed in. Let's build your personal profile through a quick chat so we can find the right connections for you.

**What do you do, and where are you based?**
onboarding.introNoName:
I'll help you create your personal profile through a simple conversation. This will help us find meaningful connections for you.

**Let's start simple — what's your name and what do you do?**
onboarding.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.profileError: There was an issue creating your profile. Please try again.

linkedin.title: Import from LinkedIn
linkedin.description: Enter your LinkedIn profile URL to auto-fill your education and work history
linkedin.importSuccess: Import successful! Data has been populated in the next steps.
linkedin.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid LinkedIn profile URL (e.g., https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile)

importConflict.title: Data Already Exists
importConflict.description: You already have {existing} entries. LinkedIn has {importing} entries to import.

birth.title: Birth Information
birth.description: Tell us about your birth date and place

complete.title: Awesome! Your timeline is ready
complete.description: Here's a preview of your life timeline. You can edit it anytime from the dashboard.

errors.emptyProfile: Please add at least one piece of information before completing.
errors.completeFailed: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.

chat.welcomeBack: Welcome back! I'm Nomi, your AI assistant 👋
chat.updateIntro:
I can see your current profile. What would you like to update or add? You can tell me about:

- New skills or experiences
- Updated goals
- Changes in what you're looking for
- Anything else about yourself
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.saveError: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

metadata.title: Nomi - Your Digital World Manual
metadata.description: Create your AI-powered personal context that works everywhere. Your story, always with you.
